title: Iron Golems Survive
description: This adds functionality to iron golems, you can equip armor on them and they auto heal within a valid village
body:
🛡 ️Iron Golem's Regenerate
===============

Current Version : 1.3 for Forge 1.16.5 & 1.20.1

### ✅✅✅ NEW FEATURES!!!!! ✅✅✅


Iron Golems Regenerate is a lightweight, server-friendly Forge mod that improves village defense by giving Iron Golems natural health regeneration under realistic and configurable conditions.

Instead of Iron Golems slowly dying off after raids, zombie attacks, or long-term wear, this mod allows them to recover health over time, making villages feel more alive, resilient, and self-sustaining — without turning golems into invincible tanks.

✨ Core Features ❤️ Natural Iron Golem Regeneration

Iron Golems periodically regenerate health when conditions are met. The healing amount is modest and balanced, restoring 2 hearts per regeneration cycle by default.

🏘️ Village-Only Behavior

Regeneration only occurs when an Iron Golem is:

Inside a valid village

Actively protecting villagers

This ensures the feature feels immersive and lore-friendly, not global or artificial.

☀️ Daytime-Only Regeneration

Iron Golems regenerate only during the day.

At night, golems remain vulnerable — preserving danger during raids, sieges, and monster attacks.

👥 Villager-Powered Boost

The presence of villagers directly influences regeneration speed:

Few or no villagers nearby → normal regeneration rate

Multiple villagers nearby → faster regeneration

This creates a meaningful relationship between villagers and their protectors — the healthier the village, the stronger its defense.

💖 Visual Healing Feedback

When an Iron Golem regenerates:

❤️ Heart particles appear above it

Makes healing clearly visible and satisfying

Helps players understand when and why regeneration happens

⚙️ Fully Configurable (Server-Friendly)

All major settings can be adjusted via a Forge config file:

Base regeneration interval

Accelerated regeneration interval

Healing amount per cycle

Villager detection radius

Minimum villagers required for fast regeneration

No client-side configuration required — perfect for servers and modpacks.

Condition	Healing	Interval
Village, daytime	2 hearts	Every 30 seconds
≥3 villagers nearby	2 hearts	Every 10 seconds
Nighttime	None	—
Outside villages	None	—



🧠 Design Philosophy

✔ Immersive and lore-friendly

✔ Lightweight and performant

✔ No new items, blocks, or entities

✔ No invasive mechanics or overpowered effects

✔ Server-safe and modpack-friendly

This mod aims to enhance vanilla gameplay, not replace it.

🧩 Compatibility

Minecraft 1.20.1

Forge

Compatible with most village, mob, and AI mods

Safe to add to existing worlds

🏗️ Perfect For

Survival worlds

Long-term villages

Server gameplay

Modpacks focused on immersion or QoL improvements

📦 Summary

Iron Golems Regenerate makes villages feel stronger, smarter, and more alive by allowing Iron Golems to heal naturally — but only when it makes sense.

Protect the villagers, and they’ll protect you right back. 🛡️❤️






# 🆕 1.20.1 Update – Golem Command System

This update introduces a powerful new way to summon and control your Iron Golems.

## 🪄 Golem Command Wand

A brand new item that allows players to summon and command their own Iron Golems.

### Features

- ✅ Summons **2 loyal Iron Golems**
- ✅ Automatically despawns after a configurable duration
- ✅ Configurable cooldown
- ✅ Only one active summoned pair per player



## 🛡 Escort Mode

**Sneak + Left Click** to toggle Escort Mode.

When enabled:
- Golems form on your left and right side
- They follow your movement dynamically
- Formation updates based on your rotation



## 🎯 Sentry Mode

**Left Click a block** to assign a defense position.

Golems will:
- Move to the selected location
- Guard the area
- Automatically attack hostile mobs within the configured radius


## ⚔ Attack Command

**Left Click a mob** to command your golems to immediately target and attack that entity.


## ⚙ Configurable Settings

New configuration options allow you to customize:

- Wand cooldown duration
- Defense radius
- Golem despawn timer
- Regeneration intervals
- Armor values & toughness
- Armorer villager behavior

All values can be adjusted in the mod's config file.
